scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy:functions:dev: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase deploy --only functions --project dev'
scripts.deploy:functions:prod: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase deploy --only functions --project prod'
scripts.deploy:rules:dev: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,storage --project dev'
scripts.deploy:rules:prod: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,storage --project prod'
scripts.deploy:indexes:dev: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes --project dev'
scripts.deploy:indexes:prod: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes --project prod'
scripts.logs:dev: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase functions:log --project dev'
scripts.logs:prod: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && firebase functions:log --project prod'
scripts.test:node20: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.9.0 >/dev/null && npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/mocha lib/test/**/*.test.js'
